name: pagination
description: Paged or load-more navigation: a numbered Pagination pager with ellipses and an announced page change, plus a LoadMore button that owns its busy state for append-style lists.

notes: Pagination is a labelled <nav>; the current page carries aria-current=page
Previous / Next are labelled and disabled at the bounds
The page change is announced via a polite live region
LoadMore disables itself and sets aria-busy while loading, announcing progress
Ellipsis gaps are aria-hidden so they aren't read as content

intents: numbered pagination over a known page count
previous / next page controls with ellipses
a load more button for append-style infinite lists
